name: self-evolve
description: Bootstraps Quiver's self-evolution loop by running validation and coding new helper tools.

goals.task: Run the run_tests tool to verify codebase integrity and ensure no compilation or test failures exist.
goals.verification: npx tsx -e "import { tool } from './src/tools/run_tests.ts'; tool.execute({}).then(res => { if(!JSON.parse(res).success) process.exit(1); });"

goals.task: Create a new tool src/tools/format_code.ts that formats TypeScript files using a format command or custom function to ensure pristine code style.
Create a new tool src/tools/log_tokens.ts that parses the latest session log from .sessions/ and prints token/turn summary statistics to help optimize context bounds.
